name: ASRock B660M-ITX/AC Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel B660 Chipset - Support DDR4-5000(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Slot - Front USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - HDMI - DisplayPort - Intel Gigabit LAN - Intel 802.11ac Wi-Fi - Bluetooth
shortName: ASRock B660M-ITX/AC Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel
description: Mini-ITX Intel B660 motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with WiFi 6 and Bluetooth 5.0.
